summary: Kit Phase 1 Feature Testing Complete - All Tests PASS. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Asset Management V2 loads correctly with all 37 new asset types visible in dropdown (Kabel, Adapter, Stromverteiler, Kits).
seed_data_creation: Kit templates KIT-SFD and KIT-TSR already seeded via seed-defaults endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kit Phase 1 fully implemented and tested. 2 kit templates (KIT-SFD with 8 components, KIT-TSR with 6 components) exist. New asset types include: Kabel Typ A (cab_usb_a, cab_usb_c, cab_lan, cab_hdmi, cab_dp, cab_pwr), Kabel Typ B/Consumables (cns_usb_a, cns_usb_c, cns_lan, cns_hdmi, cns_dp, cns_pwr), Adapter (adp_usb_c, adp_hdmi, adp_dp, adp_90), Stromverteiler (pwr_strip, pwr_12v), Kits (kit_sfd, kit_tsr). Frontend Asset Management V2 shows all types in dropdown filter.

P0_metadata_new_asset_categories.details: GET /api/asset-mgmt/metadata returns new categories: Kabel (Typ A), Kabel (Typ B), Adapter, Stromverteiler, Kits

P0_kit_template_details.details: GET /api/asset-mgmt/kit-templates/KIT-SFD returns template with 8 components including labels and suffixes

P0_kit_template_crud.details: Create, Read, Update, Delete operations for kit templates working

P0_kit_assembly.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/kits/assemble creates kit from template and returns required components list

P0_kit_scan.details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/kits/{kit_id}/scan returns kit info with components

P0_frontend_asset_type_dropdown.details: Asset Management V2 dropdown shows all 37 asset types including new Kabel, Adapter, Stromverteiler, Kit types
